---
marp: true
theme: default
paginate: true
---

<style>
@import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800&display=swap');

/* ─── Base ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
section {
  background: #ffffff;
  color: #1e293b;
  font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif;
  font-size: 21px;
  padding: 50px 68px;
  position: relative;
}

h1 {
  font-size: 2.3em;
  font-weight: 800;
  line-height: 1.15;
  margin-bottom: 0.25em;
  color: #5b21b6;
}

h2 {
  font-size: 1.65em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #5b21b6;
  margin-bottom: 0.4em;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #ede9fe;
  padding-bottom: 0.3em;
}

h3 {
  font-size: 1.0em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #0e7490;
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
  margin-top: 0.7em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}

p { line-height: 1.75; color: #334155; }

ul { padding-left: 1.2em; list-style: none; }

ul li {
  padding: 0.3em 0 0.3em 1.4em;
  color: #334155;
  position: relative;
  font-size: 1em;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

ul li::before {
  content: "▸";
  color: #7c3aed;
  position: absolute;
  left: 0;
  top: 0.42em;
  font-size: 0.9em;
}

strong { color: #1e293b; font-weight: 700; }

hr {
  border: none;
  height: 2px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7c3aed, #0e7490, transparent);
  margin: 0.9em 0;
}

section::after {
  font-size: 14px;
  color: #94a3b8;
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* ─── COVER ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
section.cover {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 60px 80px;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f3ff 0%, #ecfeff 50%, #f0f9ff 100%);
}

section.cover h1 { font-size: 2.8em; color: #3b0764; margin-bottom: 0.2em; }

section.cover .for-tag {
  font-size: 0.75em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #7c3aed;
  letter-spacing: 0.16em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
}

section.cover .tagline {
  font-size: 1.1em;
  color: #475569;
  max-width: 700px;
  line-height: 1.75;
  margin-bottom: 2em;
}

section.cover .logo-lockup {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 14px;
  margin-bottom: 1.8em;
}

section.cover .company {
  font-size: 1.05em;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1e293b;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

section.cover .divider-bar {
  width: 72px;
  height: 4px;
  background: linear-gradient(90deg, #7c3aed, #0e7490);
  border-radius: 2px;
  margin-bottom: 1.5em;
}

section.cover .confidential {
  font-size: 0.78em;
  color: #94a3b8;
  letter-spacing: 0.06em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
}

/* ─── SECTION BREAK ─────────────────────────────────────── */
section.section-header {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 64px 80px;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f3ff 0%, #ecfeff 100%);
}

section.section-header h1 { font-size: 2.7em; color: #3b0764; }

section.section-header .section-num {
  font-size: 0.75em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #a78bfa;
  letter-spacing: 0.18em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  margin-bottom: 0.6em;
}

/* ─── PROOF POINT / CASE STUDY ──────────────────────────── */
section.proof {
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f0fdf4 0%, #f5f3ff 100%);
}

.proof-label {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.68em;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.14em;
  padding: 5px 14px;
  border-radius: 20px;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
}

.proof-label.green {
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #15803d;
}

.proof-label.blue {
  background: #dbeafe;
  color: #1d4ed8;
}

.pull-quote {
  background: #f5f3ff;
  border-left: 4px solid #7c3aed;
  border-radius: 0 10px 10px 0;
  padding: 18px 24px;
  margin: 1em 0;
  font-size: 1.05em;
  font-style: italic;
  color: #3b0764;
  line-height: 1.7;
}

.pull-quote.teal {
  background: #ecfeff;
  border-left-color: #0e7490;
  color: #0c4a6e;
}

/* ─── TWO-COLUMN LAYOUT ─────────────────────────────────── */
.two-col {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 24px;
  margin-top: 0.8em;
}

.two-col-3-2 {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 3fr 2fr;
  gap: 28px;
  margin-top: 0.8em;
  align-items: start;
}

/* ─── CARDS ─────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.card {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 18px 22px;
}

.card h3 {
  font-size: 0.88em;
  margin: 0 0 0.4em 0;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
  color: #5b21b6;
}

.card p { font-size: 0.84em; color: #475569; margin: 0; line-height: 1.6; }

.card.teal h3 { color: #0e7490; }
.card.teal { border-top: 2px solid #0e7490; }
.card.purple { border-top: 2px solid #7c3aed; }

/* ─── REQUIREMENT MATCH TABLE ───────────────────────────── */
.req-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  margin-top: 0.8em;
  font-size: 0.86em;
}

.req-table th {
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #475569;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: 0.78em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.08em;
  padding: 10px 14px;
  text-align: left;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
}

.req-table td {
  padding: 9px 14px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  color: #334155;
  vertical-align: top;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

.req-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }

.req-table .req-col { color: #5b21b6; font-weight: 600; }
.req-table .exp-col { color: #0e7490; }

.badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.72em;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: 2px 10px;
  border-radius: 12px;
  background: #dcfce7;
  color: #15803d;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

/* ─── SCOPE / ASSESSMENT GRID ───────────────────────────── */
.scope-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-top: 0.8em;
}

.scope-item {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-left: 4px solid #7c3aed;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
  padding: 13px 18px;
}

.scope-item.teal { border-left-color: #0e7490; }

.scope-item .scope-title {
  font-size: 0.88em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin-bottom: 0.3em;
}

.scope-item p {
  font-size: 0.78em;
  color: #64748b;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* ─── TIMELINE ──────────────────────────────────────────── */
.timeline {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 12px;
  margin-top: 1em;
}

.week {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 18px 16px;
}

.week-badge {
  font-size: 0.66em;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #0e7490;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  margin-bottom: 0.6em;
  display: block;
}

.week h3 {
  font-size: 0.88em;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin: 0 0 0.4em 0;
  text-transform: none;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}

.week p {
  font-size: 0.78em;
  color: #64748b;
  margin: 0;
  line-height: 1.5;
}

/* ─── STAT HIGHLIGHTS ───────────────────────────────────── */
.stat-row {
  display: flex;
  gap: 16px;
  margin: 1em 0;
}

.stat {
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f5f3ff, #ecfeff);
  border: 1px solid #ddd6fe;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 16px 20px;
  flex: 1;
  text-align: center;
}

.stat .big-num {
  font-size: 2.0em;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #5b21b6;
  display: block;
  line-height: 1.1;
}

.stat .label {
  font-size: 0.78em;
  color: #64748b;
  margin-top: 0.3em;
  line-height: 1.4;
}

/* ─── PROFILE ────────────────────────────────────────────── */
section.profile {
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f3ff 0%, #ecfeff 100%);
}

.profile-content {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: auto 1fr;
  gap: 36px;
  align-items: start;
  margin-top: 0.8em;
}

.profile-avatar {
  width: 110px;
  height: 110px;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #7c3aed, #0e7490);
  border-radius: 50%;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  justify-content: center;
  font-size: 2.2em;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #ffffff;
  flex-shrink: 0;
  box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(124,58,237,0.25);
}

.profile-meta .name {
  font-size: 1.45em;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin-bottom: 0.2em;
}

.profile-meta .title-tag {
  font-size: 0.92em;
  color: #7c3aed;
  margin-bottom: 1em;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* ─── CTA ────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
section.cta {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  justify-content: center;
  padding: 60px 80px;
  background: linear-gradient(160deg, #f5f3ff 0%, #ecfeff 50%, #f0fdf4 100%);
  text-align: center;
}

section.cta h1 { font-size: 2.6em; margin-bottom: 0.5em; color: #3b0764; }

section.cta p { font-size: 1.1em; max-width: 640px; margin: 0 auto 1.5em; }

section.cta .contact-info {
  display: inline-flex;
  gap: 20px;
  margin-top: 1.5em;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  justify-content: center;
}

section.cta .contact-item {
  background: #ffffff;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 14px 28px;
  font-size: 1.0em;
  color: #475569;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06);
}

section.cta .contact-item span { color: #7c3aed; font-weight: 700; }

/* ─── SLIDE LOGO ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
.slide-logo {
  position: absolute;
  top: 26px;
  right: 68px;
  opacity: 0.5;
}
</style>

<!-- _class: cover -->

<div class="logo-lockup">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="60" height="60" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
  <div class="company">Flowcraft Systems</div>
</div>

<div class="for-tag">Prepared for Adeptiv AI</div>

# Enterprise Readiness Programme: A Proposal

<div class="divider-bar"></div>

<div class="tagline">
Hardening your platform for enterprise security reviews, regulated-industry buyers, and the certifications that turn active pipeline into signed deals.
</div>

<div class="confidential">Confidential — Vibhor Mahajan · Flowcraft Systems</div>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## We Understand Where You Are

Adeptiv AI is not an early-stage product looking for direction. You have a **mature, feature-strong AI governance platform** with real coverage — 30+ regulations, shadow-AI discovery, vendor management, AI inventory, evidence management, and deep observability.

Your deals are in motion. Large enterprise prospects in banking, financial services, and healthcare are engaged. The platform can do the work. What is standing between you and signed contracts is a different class of problem.

<div class="pull-quote">
Enterprise buyers in regulated industries do not just evaluate features. They evaluate trust — and trust is earned through security architecture, data governance, certifiable controls, and the ability to answer hard questions under scrutiny.
</div>

That is exactly the gap this engagement is designed to close.

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## What Enterprise Buyers in Your Markets Demand

When a bank, insurer, or health system evaluates an AI governance platform, their security and architecture teams arrive with a checklist that most SaaS vendors are not prepared for.

<div class="scope-grid">

<div class="scope-item">
  <div class="scope-title">Multi-tenant data isolation — provably enforced</div>
  <p>Not just logical separation. Cryptographic isolation, per-tenant key management, and architecture they can inspect</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item teal">
  <div class="scope-title">GDPR / DPDP-ready data handling end to end</div>
  <p>Capture, processing, retention, deletion, DLP — with audit evidence, not just policy documents</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item teal">
  <div class="scope-title">API & application security at OWASP standard</div>
  <p>SAST/DAST/SCA in the SDLC, API Top 10, rate limiting, WAF/DDoS, third-party pen test results</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item">
  <div class="scope-title">IAM/SSO with SAML, OIDC, SCIM</div>
  <p>Enterprise identity integration that works with their existing IdP — not a workaround</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item">
  <div class="scope-title">On-prem connectivity agent security</div>
  <p>The OCA is the surface their network team will scrutinize hardest — least-privilege, auditable, explainable</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item teal">
  <div class="scope-title">AI governance framework alignment</div>
  <p>ISO 42001, NIST AI RMF, EU AI Act — especially relevant when selling an AI governance product to regulated buyers</p>
</div>

</div>

---

<!-- _class: section-header -->

<div class="section-num">Why Flowcraft</div>

# We Have Done This — In Your Exact Markets

<hr/>

<p style="font-size: 1.1em; color: #475569; max-width: 700px; line-height: 1.8;">
Two specific proof points that are directly relevant to Adeptiv AI's needs: one in healthcare SaaS at scale, one in enterprise fintech with the most rigorous security review in the industry.
</p>

---

<!-- _class: proof -->

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

<div class="proof-label green">Proof Point 1 — Healthcare SaaS</div>

## Caresmartz360: Enterprise-Grade Healthcare at Scale

Caresmartz360 is a home care management platform serving **1,000+ business customers across North America** — a multi-tenant, regulated-industry SaaS product operating at meaningful enterprise scale.

<div class="stat-row">
  <div class="stat">
    <span class="big-num">1,000+</span>
    <div class="label">Business customers in North America</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat">
    <span class="big-num">HIPAA</span>
    <div class="label">Compliance architecture designed and maintained</div>
  </div>
  <div class="stat">
    <span class="big-num">Multi-tenant</span>
    <div class="label">Data isolation enforced at platform level</div>
  </div>
</div>

**What this means for Adeptiv AI:** Flowcraft has designed and operated the same category of architecture your buyers will interrogate — multi-tenant data isolation, HIPAA-grade controls, enterprise SSO, audit logging, and the operational security posture that comes with serving regulated buyers at scale. This is not theoretical experience.

---

<!-- _class: proof -->

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

<div class="proof-label blue">Proof Point 2 — Fortune 500 Global Fintech</div>

## Cleared the Most Rigorous Security Review — First Attempt

As Systems Architect for a well-known Fortune 500 global fintech company, designed an **Agentic AI solution** that was submitted to the organisation's internal enterprise security review process.

<div class="pull-quote teal">
The solution cleared the rigid security review in a single pass. It surprised the security reviewers — because that almost never happens.
</div>

The architecture was designed with the review's outcome in mind from day one: least-privilege agent execution, cryptographic audit trails, data residency controls, model governance boundaries, and an explainable security posture that left reviewers nothing to question.

**What this means for Adeptiv AI:** When you bring Flowcraft into your enterprise prospect security reviews, you are bringing an architect who has already satisfied the kind of scrutiny your buyers apply — not someone learning on your deals. The goal is to get your prospects to the same outcome: cleared, first pass.

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Assessment Scope: Mapped to Your Requirements

<div class="scope-grid">

<div class="scope-item">
  <div class="scope-title">Application & API Security</div>
  <p>OWASP Top 10, API Top 10, SAST/DAST/SCA in SDLC, secrets management, WAF/DDoS, pen test commissioning</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item teal">
  <div class="scope-title">Database Security & Encryption</div>
  <p>At-rest and in-transit encryption, KMS/key management, field-level encryption, backup rollover, DLP, failover</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item teal">
  <div class="scope-title">Multi-tenant Architecture & IAM</div>
  <p>Data isolation model, SAML/OIDC/SCIM, SSO integration patterns, secure frontend↔backend↔OCA communication</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item">
  <div class="scope-title">OCA Security Architecture</div>
  <p>On-prem collection agent threat model, least-privilege posture, network constraint compatibility, update management</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item">
  <div class="scope-title">Third-party Integration Hardening</div>
  <p>AWS, Azure, GCP, SharePoint connectors hardened to least-privilege, token-based, fully auditable</p>
</div>

<div class="scope-item teal">
  <div class="scope-title">GDPR & Audit Logging</div>
  <p>End-to-end audit trails, customer-accessible logs, GDPR data lifecycle (capture, retention, deletion), evidence management</p>
</div>

</div>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## AI Governance Frameworks & Compliance Alignment

Adeptiv AI sells AI governance to regulated buyers — which means your own platform must demonstrate exemplary AI governance posture. This is a credibility requirement, not just a compliance checkbox.

<div class="two-col" style="margin-top: 1em;">

<div>

### Frameworks We Will Map You Against
- **ISO 42001** — AI management system requirements
- **NIST AI RMF** — risk management framework
- **EU AI Act** — high-risk system obligations
- **GDPR / UK GDPR** — data processing and rights
- **Financial sector expectations** — FCA, Basel, DORA where applicable

</div>

<div>

### What We Will Produce
- Framework gap analysis against each standard
- Evidence library structure for audit readiness
- AI model and agent governance controls mapped to your product
- Customer-facing compliance documentation posture
- Regulatory alignment narrative for prospect security packs

</div>

</div>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## How We Work With Your Engineering Team

The deliverable from this engagement is not a report that sits on a shelf. It is a remediation roadmap your engineers can act on and an ongoing presence that keeps implementation on track.

<div class="two-col">

<div class="card purple">
<h3>Concrete Implementation Guidance</h3>
<p>Every gap in the assessment maps to specific, prioritised engineering tasks with enough technical depth that your team can execute without ambiguity — architecture diagrams, configuration specifications, code-level patterns where relevant</p>
</div>

<div class="card teal">
<h3>Prioritised Remediation Roadmap</h3>
<p>Findings tiered by deal-blocking risk, regulatory exposure, and implementation effort — so your team works the right things first and you can show progress to prospects mid-cycle</p>
</div>

<div class="card teal">
<h3>Security Review Representation</h3>
<p>Act as your security and architecture authority in live prospect security reviews, architecture discussions, and technical due diligence — fielding the hard questions, on your behalf</p>
</div>

<div class="card purple">
<h3>Ongoing Advisory Access</h3>
<p>Available as a trusted technical resource as your engineering team implements — reviewing pull requests, validating architecture decisions, and maintaining the security posture you have built</p>
</div>

</div>

---

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Engagement Timeline

<div class="timeline">

<div class="week">
  <span class="week-badge">Week 1–2</span>
  <h3>Discovery & Access</h3>
  <p>Architecture review, codebase access, stakeholder interviews, current-state documentation</p>
</div>

<div class="week">
  <span class="week-badge">Week 3–4</span>
  <h3>Full Assessment</h3>
  <p>Security, privacy, architecture, multi-tenancy, OCA, integrations, GDPR, and AI governance gap analysis</p>
</div>

<div class="week">
  <span class="week-badge">Week 5–6</span>
  <h3>Roadmap & Briefing</h3>
  <p>Prioritised remediation roadmap, risk register, executive briefing, and implementation guidance for engineering</p>
</div>

<div class="week">
  <span class="week-badge">Ongoing</span>
  <h3>Implementation & Reviews</h3>
  <p>Advisory support through remediation, plus live representation in enterprise prospect security reviews</p>
</div>

</div>

<hr/>

**Deliverables:** Full assessment report · Risk register · Prioritised roadmap · Implementation-ready engineering specs · Enterprise prospect security pack

---

<!-- _class: profile -->

<div class="slide-logo">
  <img src="data:image/png;base64," width="40" height="40" alt="Flowcraft Systems" style="display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;" />
</div>

## Who You Are Working With

<div class="profile-content">

<div class="profile-avatar">VM</div>

<div class="profile-meta">
  <div class="name">Vibhor Mahajan</div>
  <div class="title-tag">Founder, Flowcraft Systems</div>

  <p style="font-size: 0.92em; margin-bottom: 0.9em;">19+ years across software engineering, product development, enterprise architecture, platform engineering, AI transformation, and technology leadership — with specific depth in regulated-industry SaaS.</p>

  <p style="font-size: 0.92em; margin-bottom: 0.9em;"><strong>Healthcare:</strong> Engineering and architecture experience at Caresmartz360, a HIPAA-compliant multi-tenant SaaS platform serving 1,000+ business customers in North America.</p>

  <p style="font-size: 0.92em; margin-bottom: 0.9em;"><strong>Fintech:</strong> Systems architect for Agentic AI at a Fortune 500 global fintech company. Architecture cleared a rigorous enterprise security review on the first pass — a result that surprised the security reviewers themselves.</p>

  <p style="font-size: 0.88em; color: #7c3aed; font-style: italic;">Systems thinking + execution discipline + enterprise security authority — the combination Adeptiv AI needs at this stage.</p>
</div>

</div>

---
